Class BlockTypesCache.ReservedIDs

java.lang.Object
com.sk89q.worldedit.world.block.BlockTypesCache.ReservedIDs
Enclosing class:
BlockTypesCache
public static class BlockTypesCache.ReservedIDs extends Object
Statically-set reserved IDs. Should be used as minimally as possible, and for IDs that will see frequent use
